# Welcome

> Welcome to the documentation! This documentation is not complete.

- [JavaScript Site Tricks](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/sitetricks/sitetricks.md): Welcome to the main menu of JavaScript site tricks. In this documentation, you will to have dev tools. If you're on mobile, don't worry, there's another way.
- [Welcome](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/index.md): Welcome
- [Terms of Use](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/terms.md): What you can and cannot do.
- [FAQ](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/faq.md): Check out our frequently asked questions, the answer you're looking for might already be here.
- [Games](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/my-games.md): Play games that I made!

## Ad Board

- [Ad Board Installation](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/adboard/installation.md): Before getting started, insert the latest version of this product from our Discord into your game.
- [Configuring Your Ad Board](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/adboard/config.md): Need your ads switch faster? Yes, we have that.

## Tests

- [Test Page](https://ipmingsum2.github.io/tests/test.md): This is a test page.
